summary: Gallery Overhaul Testing - PASSED. Backend: 18/18 API tests passed. Frontend: All P0 features verified - Hero section, 9 content rails, explore grid with 24 cards, search/filter/sort, preview modal, remix buttons, bottom CTA. Mobile responsive (390x844) - all elements visible, 2-column grid, no overflow.
critical_code_review_comments: gallery_routes.py: Properly seeds 21+ demo items across 7 categories on startup
gallery_routes.py: Featured endpoint returns 3+ items with is_featured=true
gallery_routes.py: Rails endpoint returns all 9 expected categories (trending, most_remixed, kids, reels, emotional, cinematic, business, luxury, educational)
gallery_routes.py: Explore endpoint supports category filtering, sort modes (trending/newest/most_remixed), and pagination
Gallery.js: Hero section with featured item, stats (views/likes/remixes), Watch/Remix/Create buttons
Gallery.js: ContentRail component with horizontal scroll and navigation arrows
Gallery.js: Explore grid with 4-column desktop / 2-column mobile layout
Gallery.js: PreviewModal shows video player or thumbnail with 'Story Preview' badge
Gallery.js: Search input with client-side filtering
Gallery.js: Category filter tabs and sort buttons update explore results
Gallery.js: Remix button checks auth - redirects to /signup if not logged in
Gallery.js: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing

test_credentials.test_user: test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026# (for remix flow requiring auth)

seed_data_creation: Gallery seeded with 21+ demo items via seed_gallery_if_empty() on backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery overhaul fully tested in iteration 398. Key findings: 1) Backend APIs working: /api/gallery/featured (3+ items), /api/gallery/rails (9 rails), /api/gallery/explore (paginated with filter/sort), /api/gallery/categories (7 categories + All); 2) Frontend Gallery.js at /gallery route (NOT /explore which is different page); 3) Hero section shows featured item with Watch/Remix/Create buttons; 4) 9 content rails with horizontal scroll; 5) Explore grid with search, category filters, sort buttons; 6) Preview modal opens on card click with title, description, stats, Remix button; 7) Remix button redirects to /signup if not logged in; 8) Mobile responsive - 2-column grid, all elements visible; 9) Gallery never shows 'No videos found' - seeded content always present; 10) Bottom CTA section with 'Create Your Version' button.

backend_featured_api.details: GET /api/gallery/featured returns 3+ featured items with all required fields

backend_rails_api.details: GET /api/gallery/rails returns 9 category rails: trending, most_remixed, kids, reels, emotional, cinematic, business, luxury, educational

backend_explore_api.details: GET /api/gallery/explore supports category filter, sort modes, pagination

backend_categories_api.details: GET /api/gallery/categories returns 7 categories + All with counts

frontend_hero_section.details: Hero with featured item, title, description, stats, Watch/Remix/Create buttons

frontend_content_rails.details: 9 horizontal scroll rails with cards showing thumbnails, stats, remix buttons

frontend_search_filter_sort.details: Search input, category filter tabs, sort buttons (trending/newest/most_remixed)

frontend_preview_modal.details: Modal opens on card click with video/thumbnail, title, description, stats, Remix button

frontend_remix_flow.details: Remix button redirects to /signup if not logged in

frontend_mobile_responsive.details: All elements visible on 390x844 viewport, 2-column grid, no horizontal overflow

frontend_never_empty.details: Gallery never shows 'No videos found' - seeded content always present

frontend_bottom_cta.details: Bottom CTA section with 'Create Your Version' button linking to story-video-studio

mocked_apis.note: Gallery seed data provides demo content with pre-set metrics (views, likes, remixes). These are curated demo metrics, not live user data.
